title: TOTEM OF YOUR SKIN
description: This texture pack replace the totem of immortality with your skin.
body:
# ENGLISH #

This texture pack allows you to quickly and easily replace your boring totem with a totem in the shape of your skin, giving it a truly new lease on life.



Below, I leave you a YouTube TUTORIAL video on how to put on your skin.

TUTORIAL: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ni86JOXuyp0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  By @d_de_diego_d

# ESPAÑOL # 

Este pack de texturas te permite reemplazar de manera facil y rapida, tu aburrido totem, por un totem con la forma de tu skin, para que se sienta realmente una segunda vida.



Aqui arriba te dejo un video TUTORIAL de YouTube sobre como poner tu skin.


By @d_de_diego_d
